name: discornect
css: .discornect-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0a0a0a; overflow: hidden; } .discornect-letters { display: flex; gap: 0.05em; font-family: 'Arial Black', Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 8vw, 3.5rem); letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: lowercase; } .discornect-letters span { display: inline-block; animation: wave 1.4s ease-in-out infinite, hueshift 3s linear infinite; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(1)  { animation-delay: 0s,    0s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(2)  { animation-delay: 0.1s,  -0.3s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(3)  { animation-delay: 0.2s,  -0.6s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(4)  { animation-delay: 0.3s,  -0.9s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(5)  { animation-delay: 0.4s,  -1.2s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(6)  { animation-delay: 0.5s,  -1.5s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(7)  { animation-delay: 0.6s,  -1.8s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(8)  { animation-delay: 0.7s,  -2.1s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(9)  { animation-delay: 0.8s,  -2.4s; } .discornect-letters span:nth-child(10) { animation-delay: 0.9s,  -2.7s; } @keyframes wave { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-0.4em); } } @keyframes hueshift { 0%   { color: hsl(0,   100%, 60%); } 16%  { color: hsl(60,  100%, 60%); } 33%  { color: hsl(120, 100%, 55%); } 50%  { color: hsl(180, 100%, 55%); } 66%  { color: hsl(240, 100%, 65%); } 83%  { color: hsl(300, 100%, 60%); } 100% { color: hsl(360, 100%, 60%); } }
